title: Localize native overview and fallback workspace copy
summary: Replace remaining hardcoded user-facing copy in the macOS native overview, fallback, and preview coverage chrome with typed StudioStrings and matching string catalog entries.
acceptance_criteria: StudioMacWorkspaceChrome no longer hardcodes its overview card captions, legacy fallback status copy, or preview coverage narrative text.
New overview and fallback copy is exposed through typed StudioStrings entries backed by Localizable.xcstrings.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and a HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0010 ticket schema validated after moving overview and fallback copy onto typed StudioStrings.
Patch hygiene passed after removing hardcoded workspace chrome copy.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after localizing overview captions, fallback status text, and preview coverage narratives.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 follow-up to remove remaining hardcoded native workspace copy.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice stays read-only at the product level and focuses on truthful localized native copy.
Foundation and review inspector string cleanup remains follow-up work after the workspace chrome pass.
